title: Bulk Tea/Coffee Stirrers
features: Bulk Value Pack – 2,000 Coffee Stirrers: Great for offices, cafes, events, break rooms, and catering — ensures you never run out of stirrers.
Premium Birch Wood – Splinter-Free & Smooth: Crafted from high-quality birch wood for clean stirring without shredding or splinters.
Ideal Size for Most Cups: 5.5″ (140 mm) length with round ends fits standard mugs, takeaway cups, and cocktail glasses.
Heat-Resistant & Odor-Free: Natural wood that tolerates hot liquids without imparting taste or odor — safe for coffee, tea, cocoa.
Hygienic & Ready to Use: Individually wrapped (or bulk-packed) options available to keep stirrers clean and sanitary.
description: 2,000 Natural Wood Coffee Stirrers – Eco-Friendly Birch Coffee Stirring Sticks, 5.5″ (140 mm) Disposable Drink Stirrer Sticks for Hot & Cold Beverages, Biodegradable Bulk Pack
